title: If NERV won
wikitext:
[]: If NERV won... Post by RandomStuff » Tue Feb 05, 2008 12:15 am THis is a queston that's been bugging me for a while, I've discussed it with Jake [The biggest Eva geek a personally know, same as in sig] and thought I should put it out on here. What would have happened if NERV beat back SEELE and the JSSDF? [We're assuming 3I is somehow postponed too] If Asuka had won? Jake says they would have just gotten hit again, I think that NERV would retaliate and crush them or things would end a tense truce. [We can make the Evas fast, but you already have them armed and pointing at us. P.S. First post!

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Feb 05, 2008 12:28 am I remember a couple of these threads recently...but I'll do a search later... EDIT: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4448 If NERV won and had beaten SEELE, Gendo would've won, and he would've been back with Yui. But, there's always the chance that Rei would've rejected Gendo's version of the HIP. If Asuka had won, possibly the same thing as the above, except SEELE could've sent worldwide military forces to combat Eva 02, because SEELE virtually controls everything. Furthermore, Evas are so expensive and take so much hours to build, nobody is really willing to construct them, and even if they did, it would be too late because the UN, SEELE and the JSSDF would've beaten them already.

[]: Post by RandomStuff » Tue Feb 05, 2008 12:37 am I kinda feel dumb now

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 05, 2008 12:40 am Nerv was bucked up the futt. I GUARANTEE IT. This is so similar to the other topics (see the top of the Discussion forum), I'm going to go ahead and lock this.

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 05, 2008 12:44 am The question of Seele vs Nerv is moot, because there is a 3rd thing happening. Specifically Gendo. Regardless of whether Nerv was completely annihilated or if Seele's attack was repulsed, Gendo was already in the basement doing his thing. His success or failure doesn't necessarily even depend on Nerv nor Seele, but was in and of itself thwarted by Rei. So, several things all coming to a head at this point, although many of the instances do have some codependencies, I think ultimately, Seele or Nerv being out of the picture won't effect the outcome that we see in EoE.

Article: If NERV won
 am The question of Seele vs Nerv is moot, because there is a 3rd thing happening. Specifically Gendo. Regardless of whether Nerv was completely annihilated or if Seele's attack was repulsed, Gendo was already in the basement doing his thing. His success or failure doesn't necessarily even depend on Nerv nor Seele, but was in and of itself thwarted by Rei. So, several things all coming to a head at this point, although many of the instances do have some codependencies, I think ultimately, Seele or Nerv being out of the picture won't effect the outcome that we see in EoE.
